title: FeedTheGods
description: The gods are hungry Harvester. Can you feed them?
body:
FeedTheGods is a new style of modpack; built around the growing and logistics of food production, in order to appease the gods insatiable appetites. Others before you have tried and failed; and now the exhausted soil can no longer sustain crops. You'll need to explore the world to find patches of rich earth that can still bear fruit, set up farms, and transport the crops back to your base. But be warned, go too long between feedings, and the gods will not be happy.

### Features:
**Multiple options for progression!** Players can choose to farm crops themselves, hire MineColonists, or fight bosses for more exotic ingredients to make dishes with.

**Logistics!** Many mods include fun and powerful logistic options; but these are frequently ignored in modpacks, either due to a lack of incentive to transport items long distance, or are overshadowed by cheap teleportation options. FeedTheGods solves both these issues. You'll finally be able to build the Create train network of your dreams.

**A no mod left behind policy!** FeedTheGod's mod selection was choosen with the goal of ensuring that all mods could stand out in their own area; with mods with too much overlap or strength when compared to other mods in the pack removed. Every mod present is useful in some way.

**"Upgrades people, upgrades!"** While the gods are quick to smite those who anger them; they are not above rewarding the faithful.
